g.text: Trust: 100/100 (high) — 'bye' or '/end' to disconnect | /? for help
Ask Mivari directly what trade they are most interested in
exchanging for the player's needed items.
Greetings. A crash-landing, you say? I am Mivari, and I'm happy to
hear you are here on Enceladus. Tell me more about your ship and what you ne
Translation mostly clear. A few gaps.
